---
description: "Create a compact HasbeMaal handoff for a fresh thread or compaction checkpoint."
argument-hint: "Optional focus area or next issue"
agent: "AI Team Lead"
---

Create a compact handoff for continuing HasbeMaal work in a fresh thread or after compaction.

Requirements:
- Verify current branch/worktree status with GitHub or GitKraken tools when available.
- Verify issue, commit, push, and remote-sync state with GitHub or GitKraken tools instead of relying on chat summaries.
- Summarize only repo evidence, validated behavior, and explicit user decisions.
- Do not include real SMS text, account identifiers, UPI IDs, phone numbers, transaction references, exported data, secrets, or screenshots with financial details.
- Keep the handoff copy-pasteable and short enough to start the next thread with clear context.

Include:
- Repository, branch, and working tree state.
- Current product goal and target issue or open issue queue.
- Recent completed work with commit hashes and push status, when verified.
- Validation already run and any known failures.
- Current architecture/privacy constraints that matter for the next slice.
- Remaining risks, open questions, and the next recommended validation command.
- Explicit stop rule: work one issue or slice at a time, then validate and hand off or compact.
